description: Trigger a Qlik Replicate task (run/stop/reload) via the Enterprise Manager REST API. Wraps a Dagster job around a single Replicate control-plane call. Pairs with qlik_replicate_resource for auth. For continuous CDC use wait_for_completion=false; for one-shot migrations set true so the job waits for terminal state.

server.label: Replicate Server
server.description: Server name as registered in Enterprise Manager (not a hostname — the display name shown in EM's servers list).

run_option.label: Run Option
run_option.description: For action=run: RESUME_PROCESSING | RELOAD_TARGET | RECOVER | RESUME_PROCESSING_FROM_TIMESTAMP

wait_for_completion.label: Wait for Completion
wait_for_completion.description: Poll until the task reaches a terminal state (STOPPED / ERROR). Right for one-shot migrations; leave false for continuous CDC.

poll_interval_seconds.label: Poll Interval (s)
poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between status polls when wait_for_completion=true.

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout (s)
timeout_seconds.description: Give up polling after this many seconds. Raises on timeout.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Resource key to look up (must match a qlik_replicate_resource registration).

schedule.label: Cron Schedule
schedule.description: Optional cron expression. Leave empty for no schedule.

default_status.label: Schedule Default Status
default_status.description: STOPPED | RUNNING — initial state of the schedule at Dagster startup.
